definitions: A 2012 action-adventure video game developed by Ubisoft Sofia and published by Ubisoft, originally released on PlayStation Vita.
A spin-off title in the Assassin's Creed series, featuring Aveline de Grandpré as the main protagonist in 18th-century New Orleans.
examples: I spent hours playing Assassin's Creed Liberation on my Vita.
Assassin's Creed Liberation introduced a unique protagonist to the series.
